title: Garlicky Syrian Wrap
description: A flavorful wrap filled with garlicky goodness, perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Warm the Syrian wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Spread the garlicky sauce on the wrap, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Sprinkle the herb mix on top of the sauce.
Add the shredded lettuce and sliced tomato on top of the herb mix.
Fold the bottom edge of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
